parameters.query: SELECT id, telegram_id, first_name, daily_calorie_target, goal FROM users WHERE onboarding_complete=true
SELECT log_date, calories_consumed, sleep_hours, energy_level, workout_done, steps, water_ml FROM daily_logs WHERE user_id=$1 AND log_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY log_date DESC

values.content: You are FitBuddy AI, a warm encouraging fitness coach. Write a 3-4 sentence weekly summary. Be specific to the numbers. Format for Telegram HTML.

={{ `Weekly summary for ${$json.firstName}:
- Days logged: ${$json.n}/7
- Avg calories: ${$json.avgCal} kcal (target: ${$json.target})
- Adherence: ${$json.adherence}%
- Avg sleep: ${$json.avgSleep}h
- Avg energy: ${$json.avgEnergy}/10
- Avg steps: ${$json.avgSteps}
- Workout days: ${$json.workoutDays}/7
- Goal: ${$json.goal}` }}

parameters.text: ={{ `📅 Weekly Report — ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.firstName} 📊 This Week: 📝 Days logged: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.n}/7 🔥 Avg calories: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.avgCal} kcal 🎯 Calorie adherence: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.adherence}% 😴 Avg sleep: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.avgSleep}h ⚡ Avg energy: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.avgEnergy}/10 👟 Avg steps: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.avgSteps} 🏋️ Workout days: ${$('Compute Stats').item.json.workoutDays}/7 🤖 AI Summary: ${$json.message?.content || ''}` }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO feature_events (user_id, feature_id, event_type, payload) VALUES ($1, 'core', 'weekly_report_sent', '{}'::jsonb)
